# 联影智能 AI 能力平台 / UII AI Capability Hub

> 把联影自研影像 AI 变成人和智能体都能直接调用的标准服务（云 SaaS 交付，HIPAA/BAA 合规）。本文件为机器可读的能力目录摘要。
> Turn UII first-party imaging AI into cloud services people and agents can call. Machine-readable catalog summary.

## Capabilities

- **AI-Assisted Easy Triage System - Rib** [skill/CT] — research (not a device):  MCP: https://hub.uii-ai.example/mcp/easy-triage-rib
- **Easy Triage System - ICH** [skill/CT] — FDA K242292 (2024-12-20): When an ER physician needs to evaluate a patient's head CT for intracranial hemorrhage, this Skill automatically performs ICH screening and quantitative analysis, outputs a structured triage summary, and assists the physician in rapidly identifying critical conditions MCP: https://hub.uii-ai.example/mcp/easy-triage-ich
- **AI-Assisted Analysis System for Bony Thorax Fractures** [skill/CT] — research (not a device):  MCP: https://hub.uii-ai.example/mcp/bony-thorax-fractures
- **AI-Assisted Analysis System for Aortic Dissection** [skill/CT] — research (not a device):  MCP: https://hub.uii-ai.example/mcp/aortic-dissection
- **AI-Assisted Analysis System for Cerebral and Carotid Vessels** [skill/CT] — research (not a device):  MCP: https://hub.uii-ai.example/mcp/cerebral-carotid-vessels
- **AI-Assisted Analysis System for Coronary CTA Imaging** [skill/CT] — research (not a device):  MCP: https://hub.uii-ai.example/mcp/coronary-cta
- **AI-Assisted Analysis System for Lower Extremity CTA Imaging** [skill/CT] — research (not a device):  MCP: https://hub.uii-ai.example/mcp/lower-extremity-cta
- **AI-Assisted Analysis System for Intracerebral Hemorrhage** [skill/CT] — research (not a device):  MCP: https://hub.uii-ai.example/mcp/intracerebral-hemorrhage
- **VitalLens** [skill/Cross] — research (not a device): Capture facial video through a standard camera to perform non-contact heart-rate and respiratory-rate detection, returning measurements with confidence scores MCP: https://hub.uii-ai.example/mcp/vitallens-rppg
